message_text: I need to discuss this because your outstanding amount looks incorrect to me.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. I can review the account details and route your dispute. To verify identity, provide the last 2 digits of the phone number on file, or your full name if needed.
Please send the ledger details for the balance, including the payments you have applied and the dates, so I can reconcile the discrepancy before discussing any payment.
